description.p: Focal is a deliberately constrained, portastudio-style digital audio workstation. Fixed 16-channel topology with a fixed signal chain (HPF, 4-band EQ, FET/Opto compressor, sends, pan, mute/solo, fader), four aux buses, and a mastering chain with Pultec EQ, bus compressor, tape saturation, and limiter.

Built for musicians who want to commit to sounds and finish songs instead of endlessly tweaking. Inspired by Tascam Portastudio hardware: every parameter is visible, no plugin chains, no bus reordering, no waveform-level editing.
